title: Backup Templates
subtitle: Manage command templates for backups
searchPlaceholder: Search templates by name, description or commands...

fields.name: Name *
fields.useStepsDesc: Configure individual steps with expect, pauses and error handling
fields.commandsPlaceholder:
show running-config
show version
show interfaces
fields.commandsHint: One command per line. They will be executed in sequence.

toast.exportNone: Select at least one template to export
toast.deleteNone: Select at least one template to delete
toast.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} template(s)?
toast.cloneNone: Select at least one template to clone

validation.commandRequired: Fill in the command for all steps
validation.patternRequired: Fill in the pattern (regex) for all steps
validation.pauseRequired: Set the pause time for pause-type steps

advanced.loginSuccessPatternHint: Used only after sending the password. E.g. `[>#]` for devices that emit async logs before a stable prompt.
advanced.regexHint: Regex (one per line) to remove from start of output

telnetSync.title: Template-Scoped Telnet Sync
telnetSync.enableHint: Keeps this behavior restricted to this template.
telnetSync.idleMsHint: When enabled, the template only applies post-key drain behavior in the Telnet flow.

steps.title: Execution Steps
steps.subtitle: Configure commands and actions in execution order
steps.none: No steps configured. Add commands and actions above.

types.commandDesc: Send a command to the device
types.expectDesc: Wait for a specific pattern in the output
types.setPromptDesc: Define the prompt pattern to wait for
types.sendKeyDesc: Send a key (Enter, Space, Tab, etc.)

fields.patternHint: Use regular expressions. E.g.: #|>|\$ for common prompts
fields.keyHint: Sends the key directly to the device without waiting for response
fields.captureOutputDesc: Include this command output in the backup
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Description of the purpose of this step...
